UserDialog.DialogText: You must have completed the MSQ quest 'The Feat of Pots' to do Wachumeqimeqi Deliveries

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70511) and not IsQuestCompleted(70512) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

UserDialog.DialogText: CRP/LTW/WVR Deliveries - You must be 90 to take on the next quest 'Hanu Opportunities'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70511) and not IsQuestCompleted(70512) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 89
IsQuestCompleted(70512) and not IsQuestCompleted(70513) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 93

UserDialog.DialogText: CRP/LTW/WVR Deliveries - You must be 93 to take on the next quest 'This Little Pelu'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70512) and not IsQuestCompleted(70513) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 92
IsQuestCompleted(70513) and not IsQuestCompleted(70514) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 95

UserDialog.DialogText: CRP/LTW/WVR Deliveries - You must be 95 to take on the next quest 'Oldton Roads'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70513) and not IsQuestCompleted(70514) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 94
IsQuestCompleted(70515) and not IsQuestCompleted(70516) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 98

UserDialog.DialogText: CRP/LTW/WVR Deliveries - You must be 98 to take on the next quest 'Reaching for the Sky'

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70515) and not IsQuestCompleted(70516) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 97
IsQuestCompleted(70516) and not IsQuestCompleted(70517) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 100

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70516) and not IsQuestCompleted(70517) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 99
IsQuestCompleted(70504) and not IsQuestCompleted(70505) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

If.Condition: IsQuestCompleted(70504) and not IsQuestCompleted(70505) and Core.Player.ClassLevel > 89
IsQuestCompleted(70505) and not IsQuestCompleted(70506) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 93

UserDialog.DialogText: BSM/ARM/GSM Deliveries - You must be 93 to take on the next quest 'Hey, Aunt Tii'

IsQuestCompleted(70504) and not IsQuestCompleted(70505) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

IsQuestCompleted(70519) and not IsQuestCompleted(70520) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 93

IsQuestCompleted(70504) and not IsQuestCompleted(70505) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

IsQuestCompleted(70532) and not IsQuestCompleted(70533) and Core.Player.ClassLevel < 90

(IsQuestCompleted(&ADreamComeTrue;) and IsQuestCompleted(&APlaceintheSun;) and IsQuestCompleted(&ThreeCheersforSweetJuice;)) and not IsQuestCompleted(70503)

LogMessage.Message: Not already on a crafter class, swapping.
